configurations.name: Run Dev PS
configurations.command: powershell -NoExit -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','Set-Location ''${workspaceFolder}/tourneyClient''; npm run dev'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; dotnet run --project tourneyAPI --launch-profile http-dummy-users"

configurations.name: Run Dev Bash
configurations.command: bash -lc "cd '${workspaceFolder}/tourneyClient' && npm run dev & cd '${workspaceFolder}' && dotnet run --project tourneyAPI --launch-profile http-dummy-users"
